name: CONOCOPHILLIPS
summary: ConocoPhillips is an independent exploration and production (E&P) company headquartered in Houston, Texas, operating in 14 countries. The company explores for, produces, transports, and markets crude oil, bitumen, natural gas, NGLs, and LNG. Its portfolio includes unconventional plays in North America (Delaware Basin, Eagle Ford, Bakken, Midland Basin), conventional assets in Europe, Africa, and Asia, LNG developments, and oil sands in Canada. Total 2025 production was 2,375 MBOED with total assets of approximately $122 billion.

products.name: Crude Oil
products.description: Exploration, production, transport and marketing of crude oil across global operations.

products.name: Natural Gas
products.description: Production and marketing of natural gas from unconventional and conventional assets worldwide.

products.name: Natural Gas Liquids (NGLs)
products.description: Production and marketing of NGLs from North America and international operations.

products.name: Bitumen
products.description: Production of bitumen from oil sands operations in Canada.

products.name: LNG
products.description: Liquefied natural gas development and marketing from international operations.

partnerships.description: Hilcorp is the operator of the Greater Prudhoe Area where ConocoPhillips holds a 36.5% interest.
